response.justification: Bogdan brings 15+ years of progressive full-stack experience with strong alignment to the core stack — TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, and Kubernetes — and directly relevant AI agent infrastructure work at his current Naver role. His deep TDD culture, open-source testing libraries, and conference talks signal technical depth and engineering craft. Key gaps are the absence of Nest.js and Vitest (primary stack items), no Kotlin or Python mentioned, and no PostgreSQL experience; however, his demonstrated polyglot history makes these learnable gaps rather than disqualifiers.
strengths: Explicit AI agent and MCP framework development at Naver directly satisfies the JD's AI agent requirement
Strong multi-year production experience with TypeScript, Node.js, React, and MongoDB across Naver and Tencent
Exceptional testing culture: authored testing libraries (Fluent-Asserts, Trial), ran TDD workshops, and applied TDD/pairing/CI professionally at RIDE Capital
concerns: Nest.js is a primary stack requirement with no mention anywhere in the resume
Python and Kotlin are listed as required/secondary languages but neither appears in skills or work history
PostgreSQL not referenced; database experience skews heavily toward MongoDB and MySQL
